verification.method: Open this manifest with a cache-busting query parameter and compare buildId plus sourceCommit with the deployed page readout.
verification.cachePolicy: The page fetches this file with cache: no-store and a cacheBust query parameter.
verification.sourceCommitPolicy: sourceCommit points to the final functional v0.28.0 commit containing tool schema v2, condition states, persistent maintenance demands, legacy tool-save migration, maintenance verification and the world-save app-version bump; later documentation and manifest commits may follow it.
